description: Multiple SQL injection vulnerabilities in DEV web management system 1.5 and earlier allow remote attackers to execute arbitrary SQL commands via the (1) cat parameter in an openforum action (openforum.php) in index.php, (2) cat parameter in getfile.php, and (3) target parameter in download_now.php.
